training_status: weight training for 8 months, fit, strong, can do pull-ups, weighted squats, running

benefits.description: Mild improvement at 55 days, significant improvement at 3-4 months. Permanent healing of tendonosis, hamstring pain, elbow pain, ankle, and knee injury. Able to run, do pull-ups, weighted squats, sleep in any position without pain.
Accelerated recovery from twisted knee injury during training.

side_effects.description: Ravenous appetite from BPC-157, required intermittent fasting to manage.
TB-500 worsened anxiety and gave nightmares, cortisol spike. Had to reduce doses and take only in morning.

protocol_notes: Used approximately 7 BPC-157 vials and 5 TB-500 vials total from March 2022 to December 2022. Started March 2022, used 1 vial of each per month initially. Doses varied from 150-250 mcg per injection. Each vial was 10mg. Injected close to injured areas when possible, sometimes into belly. Took peptides every other month after summer 2022. Brand: Canlabs.
